finality_rule: sem BANK_CONFIRMED = não é dinheiro real (without BANK_CONFIRMED = not real money)

finality_state_machine.rule: Forward-only transitions. No reversals. FINALIZED is terminal.

current_status.note: No real transactions yet — PSP credentials required (STRIPE_SECRET_KEY or ADYEN_API_KEY)

reconciliation.note: Vacuously true — 100% accuracy when no payment records exist

sha256_audit_chain.description: Every state transition recorded with SHA-256 chain hash. Root hash covers all transactions in period.
sha256_audit_chain.algorithm: SHA-256 forward chain: chainHash(prevHash, data) → rootHash(allHashes)

issues: NO PSP CONFIGURED: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY or ADYEN_API_KEY required for real settlements
SEPA INACTIVE: GOCARDLESS_ACCESS_TOKEN required for SEPA transfers

activation_checklist: Process first real transaction → verify BANK_CONFIRMED state reached
Call POST /api/financial/finality to generate first SHA-256 audit package
